# Order Forms

Operations related to order forms. Order forms are the customer-facing booking interfaces for service requests, product selection, and appointment scheduling.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/order-form-sessions` | Create order form session. | Bearer token required |
| `GET` | `/order-forms` | List order forms. | Bearer token required |

## `POST /order-form-sessions`

Create order form session.

Create order form session

- Operation ID: `post-order-form-sessions`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError403`, `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `OrderFormSessionPostPayload`, `OrderFormSessionResource`

### Parameters

None.

### Request Body

- Required: No
- `application/json`: `OrderFormSessionPostPayload`

| Status | Description | Content |
| --- | --- | --- |

| `403` | ApiError403 | `application/json`: `ApiError403` |

| `422` | ApiFail422 | `application/json`: `ApiFail422` |
| `500` | ApiError500 | `application/json`: `ApiError500` |

## `GET /order-forms`

List order forms.

Lists all order forms for the current group.

- Operation ID: `get-order-forms`
- Authentication: Bearer token required
- Related schemas: `ApiError403`, `ApiError404`, `ApiError500`, `ApiFail422`, `OrderFormCollection`

### Parameters

None.

### Request Body

None.

### Responses

| `200` | OrderFormCollection | `application/json`: `OrderFormCollection` |
| `403` | ApiError403 | `application/json`: `ApiError403` |
